steps.name: statement-draft-surface-inventory
steps.summary: FS1 inventoried 1109/1115/1116 review-pack fields that can feed balance sheet, income statement, OCI, and note candidates. Next FS2 should add a common StatementLineCandidate schema and adapters that start from journal_entry lines, then enrich with classification/path/measurement and human-review questions.

steps.name: statement-line-schema
steps.summary: FS2 added kifrs/workflows/statement_draft with StatementLineCandidate schema plus 1109/1115/1116 review-pack adapters. Journal-entry lines now map to balance_sheet/income_statement/note candidates, enriched with citations and human-review questions. Verified by tests/test_statement_draft.py and review-pack/disclosure regression tests.
